holdings.infoBox: IYE is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are Exxon Mobil stock at 21.68%, Chevron at 15.49%, ConocoPhillips at 6.30%, The Williams Companies at 4.47%, and SLB N.V. at 3.82%.

overview.description: The iShares U.S. Energy ETF (IYE) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in energy equity. The fund tracks a market-cap-weighted index of large-cap US companies in the energy industry. IYE was launched on Jun 12, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.
